tasks.description: Refactor action-execution-modal i18n from static _I18N code map to data-driven config in copilot-prompt.json (matching copilot button dropdown pattern). Move labels to ui-labels section. DAO mode.

Instruction modal text not localized to Chinese when .x-ipe.yaml language=zh. The INSTRUCTIONS section (e.g., "Refine Idea" modal) shows English text; should be Chinese except CLI flags (--workflow-mode etc). Source: Feedback-20260322-215956. DAO mode.
